---
title: "Felicity Lott, 1947 – 2026"
date: "2026-05-18"
---

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=97QndmYbwtE >}}



<p>There have been so many moving obituaries and fond tributes. Here, to mark her passing, is Felicity Lott at the start of her stellar career, singing Pamina at Glyndebourne, almost fifty years ago. How joyous. And there was, by the way,  a wonderful episode of <a href="https://www.bbc.co.uk/sounds/play/m002w61d">This Cultural Life on the BBC a few days ago</a>, a conversation with Felicity Lott, broadcast the day before she died: a life well lived.</p>
